text:
It was a sunny day on a cozy café corner in a little town. Lucy, sitting elegantly with a steaming cup of chamomile tea, heard her nephew Jamie's distinctive laugh tinkling through the window.

"Old Man Jenkins always says the stars whisper secrets. Says I'm supposed to find one tonight."

Lucy chuckled. "Just listen hard, dear. Do you hear it?"

Jamie pointed excitedly at the glittery streaks dancing across the sky.

"Yes! There it is, just behind Orion." He leaned in. "Look at that bright one...?"

"I think you've caught a shooting star."

Jamie watched it streak across the sky. "That's definitely one!"

Lucy rose, her eyes twinkling.

"Go to bed soon. It's past midnight. You'll wake up dreaming of grand adventures."

Jamie nodded, bouncing excitedly. "Thanks, Grandma!"

With a kiss on his forehead, he dashed off into the night.

Sipping her tea,
